name: Josh Durey
description: AI-evaluation, LLM-quality, and red-team specialist. Reproducible cross-model audits and the harnesses behind them.
heroHeadline: I evaluate and red-team frontier AI, and I ship the harnesses to prove it.
heroLede: I'm an AI-evaluation and LLM-quality specialist. I design adversarial evals that catch real failure modes across models on identical inputs. Then I turn the results into reproducible audits you can cite.
thesis: Most multi-model evaluations run the models one at a time and compare notes after. But the failures that matter only show up when every model faces the same input at the same moment. That's **structural simultaneity**, and it's the difference between an anecdote and an audit.
